allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process WINWORD,powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,@{n='\\''Title'\\'';e={$_.MainWindowTitle}},@{n='\\''Mem\(MB\)'\\'';e={[int]\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String -Width 200')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Id,@{n='\\''Title'\\'';e={$_.MainWindowTitle}} | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String; '\\''--- lock check ---'\\''; try { $f=[System.IO.File]::Open\(\(Resolve-Path '\\''VERIFY_filled_sample.docx'\\''\).Path,'\\''Open'\\'','\\''Read'\\'','\\''None'\\''\); $f.Close\(\); '\\''VERIFY: not locked, readable'\\'' } catch { '\\''VERIFY: LOCKED/in-use -> '\\''+$_.Exception.Message }; '\\''--- MOTW check ---'\\''; \(Get-Item '\\''VERIFY_filled_sample.docx'\\'' -Stream * -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Stream | Out-String\)')
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -Expand Count")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.MainWindowTitle } | ForEach-Object { '\\''killing PID '\\''+$_.Id; $_ | Stop-Process -Force }; '\\''remaining: '\\'' + \(\(Get-Process WINWORD -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count\)')
